Package javashooter.ui

Class GameUI

java.lang.Object
javashooter.ui.GameUI
All Implemented Interfaces:
ActionListener, EventListener
public class GameUI extends Object implements ActionListener
The main window of the game. Defines the menu, buttons, drawing area, ... Do not modify this!!

    void
    setSize(int sizeX, int sizeY)
    Sets size of both main game JFrame, as well as the game canvas, and adds 50 pixs to the height to make room for the main game buttons on the bottom.
